mission.title: minio: [resolved] Versioning support
mission.description: [resolved] Versioning support. This issue affects 9+ users.

steps.title: Identify minio troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your minio deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review minio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant minio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio
kubectl get configmap -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio
```
Would be great to have [versioning](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/Versioning.html) support.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [resolved] Versioning support
steps.description:
> Hi,
> using 'master' branch where the PR is merged throws always 'Missing Content-MD5 header' error if using 'aws-sdk-java' dependency as they don't include that header when enabling/disabling versioning.
> 
> I've been checking your addings and I can see that for Minio is required. Usingin minio-client dependency works but I want to know if this feature could be reviewed or not.
> 
> Thanks in advance

Use it and report issues if you must . We would like community to use it.

NOTE: things

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade minio to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade minio:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade minio minio/minio --namespace minio
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n minio
helm list -n minio
```

steps.title: Confirm [resolved] Versioning support is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n minio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
> Hi,
> using 'master' branch where the PR is merged throws always 'Missing Content-MD5 header' error if using 'aws-sdk-java' dependency as they don't include that header when enabling/disabling versioning.
> 
> I've been checking your addings and I can see that for Minio is required. Usingin minio-client dependency works but I want to know if this feature could be reviewed or not.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with minio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
